name: labarchive-integration
tagline: Drives the LabArchives ELN REST API for auth, notebook backups, entries/attachments, and third-party tool integrations.
verdict: Scope-matched, well-documented API integration skill (auth, backup, entries, reports, Protocols.io/Jupyter/REDCap). Main risk: it tells users to `git clone` and `pip install .` an unofficial, unpinned third-party wrapper (mcmero/labarchives-py) straight from GitHub, which is a supply-chain trust gap. No malicious behavior, secret exfiltration, or hidden inst

highlights.summary: Line 222 has the user `git clone https://github.com/mcmero/labarchives-py` and run `uv pip install .` — an unofficial third-party wrapper (not published by LabArchives, not on PyPI), no commit pin or
No 'do not use when' guidance is given, e.g. for non-Enterprise accounts lacking API access or when LabArchives isn't the target ELN.
